text: Papa ne aaj subah announce kiya ki unhone meri kundali ek achhi family mein mila li hai aur hamari jaati mein rishta tay kar diya hai. Main apni hidden identity aur apne same-sex partner ke baare mein unhe bata nahi sakta kyunki khandaan ki 'izzat' mitti mein mil jayegi. Apni sacchai ka gala ghot kar main unke faisle ke aage chup khada hoon taaki 'log kya kahenge' ka kalesh na ho.

Aaj Papa ne achanak phone par bata diya ki aane wale Sunday ko mera roka hai kyunki meri umar nikal rahi hai aur samaj mein unhe jawab dena padta hai. Main is urban isolation mein apne partner ke sath ghut raha hoon, par baap ki authority ke khilaf aawaz uthane ki himmat nahi hai. Apni asliyat chhupate huye maine bas phone par haan bol diya taaki parivaar ka samman bana rahe aur koi bada tamasha na ho.

Maine apne partner ko dost bata kar milwaya tha par Papa ne caste mismatch ka bahana dekar use ghar aane se rok diya, aur aaj mera rishta ek ladki se fix kar diya. Meri himmat nahi hui ki main apni sacchai bata kar samaj mein unki naak kataun, isliye maine unke faisle par koi bagawat nahi ki. Ek adarsh beta banne ke bojh tale main apne pyar ko kurban kar raha hoon taaki sasural aur rishtedaron mein ghar ki maryada bachi rahe.

Papa ne bina meri marzi sune aaj faisla suna diya ki wo bhari dowry dekar meri shadi jaldi kar rahe hain, taaki shehar mein mere 'ajeeb' doston ka chakkar khatam ho. Main azaad hona chahti hoon par family fear aur unki heart condition ke karan main apni hidden identity bahar nahi la sakti. Unki khushi aur samaj ki 'izzat' ke liye main ghut-ghut kar is jhoothe rishte ko nibhane ke liye taiyar ho gayi hoon.

Papa ne aaj achanak order diya ki mujhe apni shehar ki life chhod kar wapas gaon aana hoga kyunki unhone meri kundali apne hisaab se ek aache ladke ke sath mila li hai. Mera dil ro raha hai apne partner ko chhodne ke khayal se, par main apne pita ka sir sharam se jhukta nahi dekh sakti. Parivaar ko 'log kya kahenge' ke taano se bachane ke liye maine apni aawaz daba di aur unka faisla bina kisi bahas ke maan liya.
